scheme.launched_by: Government of Maharashtra – Women and Child Development Department
scheme.department: Women and Child Development Department, Maharashtra
scheme.department_address: 3rd Floor, New Administrative Building, Madam Cama Road, Hutatma Rajguru Chowk, Mumbai – 400032
scheme.mobile_app: Narishakti Doot App (available on Play Store)

objective.primary: To provide economic independence to women in Maharashtra
secondary: Improve health and nutrition of women
Strengthen the decisive role of women in family
Support women from economically weaker sections
Promote girls' education by reducing school dropouts

monthly_financial_assistance.transfer_mode: DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) into Aadhaar-linked bank account
monthly_financial_assistance.note_for_nsmn_beneficiaries: Women receiving ₹1,000/month under Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi (NSMN) will receive only ₹500 under this scheme, totalling ₹1,500 from both schemes combined

additional_benefits: Free LPG gas cylinders – 3 per year
Educational fee waivers for girls from OBC and EWS categories for higher education

residency.details: Must be a permanent resident of Maharashtra state

age.note: Upper age limit was originally 60 years; extended to 65 years by CM Eknath Shinde

annual_family_income.note: Outsourced employees, voluntary workers, and contract workers earning up to ₹2,50,000/year are also eligible

eligible_categories: One unmarried woman per family (कुटुंबातील एक अविवाहित महिला)
marital_status.note: Only ONE unmarried woman per family is eligible

bank_account.details: Must have an individual savings bank account linked with Aadhaar card
bank_account.joint_account: NOT eligible – Aadhaar Payment Bridge (APBS) routes funds to individual accounts only

family_vehicle.four_wheeler_restriction: Family should NOT own a four-wheeler vehicle (tractors are exempt)

qualification.note: No minimum educational qualification is mandated for this scheme

ineligibility_criteria.taxpayer: A family member is an income taxpayer
ineligibility_criteria.government_employee: Applicant or family member holds a permanent government job
ineligibility_criteria.vehicle: Family owns a four-wheeler vehicle (other than tractor)
ineligibility_criteria.kyc: Incomplete e-KYC on the official portal
ineligibility_criteria.bank_issues: Incorrect or mismatched bank account details
ineligibility_criteria.age_out_of_range: Applicant is below 21 years or above 65 years of age
ineligibility_criteria.non_resident: Not a permanent resident of Maharashtra
ineligibility_criteria.joint_account_holder: Uses a joint bank account for DBT
ineligibility_criteria.government_land: Condition regarding families owning government land has been REMOVED (no longer applies)

documents_required.purpose: Identity proof and Aadhaar-linking for DBT
Individual bank account linked with Aadhaar for Direct Benefit Transfer
To verify applicant is between 21–65 years old
To confirm annual family income is below ₹2,50,000
Identification of economically weaker section and family details
Proof of being a permanent resident of Maharashtra
Proof of residential address in Maharashtra
For widowed, divorced, or abandoned women

steps: Visit the official Ladki Bahin portal
Click on 'Applicant Login' on the homepage
Fill in registration form: name, password, address
Log in and fill application form with personal, income, and bank details
online.app: Narishakti Doot App (available on Play Store)

steps: Visit nearest Zilla Parishad or Anganwadi Center
Submit completed form to the official
Visit the official Ladki Bahin Yojana website
Click on the 'e-KYC' option on the homepage
Enter Aadhaar number and captcha code
Upload documents and required information (name, address, ration card number, income details)
ekyc.note: e-KYC is mandatory to continue receiving monthly benefits

scheme_portal_data.note: Portal figures as seen on official website screenshot; beneficiary count may update after final verification

related_schemes.name: Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi (NSMN)
related_schemes.note: Women receiving NSMN get only ₹500 from Ladki Bahin; total = ₹1500
